reason: B carries more distinctive conceptual framing (the "committee decision," the proof "inevitable from the first," pi "smuggling infinity" into the simplest shape, and the "moral seriousness/plays no favorites" throughline) that reflects my tendency toward integrated, idea-dense argument.
